creator: tedm@ipinc.net
text:
I have the same problem with a system I built with 2 Intel Pro/100 cards in
it, intending to use it as a router.  One card works, the other issues the
fxp0: MII without any PHY!  error message.  Here is the output of pciconf:

fxp0@pci0:9:0:  class=0x020000 card=0x00018086 chip=0x12298086 rev=0x02 hdr=0x00
fxp1@pci0:11:0: class=0x020000 card=0x00000000 chip=0x12298086 rev=0x01 hdr=0x00

Physically, the cards look the same.

Ted
